codeReview.summary: Reviewed the mission feature entry, worker handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and the resulting bullpen/statcast client/test files. The feature correctly persists lagged pitch-count, rest, xFIP, availability, early-season defaults, and anti-leakage timestamps, but the live inherited-runner ingestion path is broken: the normalizer cannot read the stringified pitching-log date column, so IR% falls back to zeros instead of using 30-game bullpen game logs.

issues.description: `_normalize_inherited_runner_logs()` looks for `Date`/`date`/`game_date`, but `fetch_team_game_logs()` stringifies Baseball Reference MultiIndex columns into names like `Pitching_Date` (`src/clients/statcast_client.py:291-292,449-461`). Because the date column is never matched on the live pitching-log path, `_build_inherited_runner_lookup()` drops every team log and `compute_bullpen_features()` silently fills inherited-runner metrics with `0.0`. That means `*_bullpen_ir_pct_30g` does not satisfy the feature contract on real data even though the synthetic injected tests pass.

The regression coverage for pitching team logs only checks that a separate parquet is written for `log_type="pitching"`; its fake payload uses `Offense_Date`/`Offense_R` columns and never exercises the `Pitching_*` column names or `_normalize_inherited_runner_logs()` path that the bullpen feature relies on. This gap is why the broken live IR% parser shipped undetected.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state does not document the Baseball Reference team-game-log normalization contract: `fetch_team_game_logs()` now both namespaces caches by `log_type` and flattens MultiIndex columns into strings such as `Pitching_Date`/`Pitching_IR`. Downstream feature work depends on those exact names, but neither `.factory/library/`, `AGENTS.md`, nor the `feature-worker` skill mentions it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `src/clients/statcast_client.py:268-293` writes separate batting/pitching cache files and `src/clients/statcast_client.py:449-461` flattens column names; `grep` over `.factory/library/*.md`, mission `AGENTS.md`, and `.factory/skills/feature-worker/SKILL.md` found no `team_game_logs`, `log_type`, or `Pitching_*` guidance.

summary: Review failed. Most bullpen outputs were implemented cleanly, but the real inherited-runner feed is effectively disconnected because pitching team-log dates are not parsed after column stringification, so the shipped IR% feature devolves to zeros.
